rec.transport.title: Use Public Transport
rec.transport.subtitle: Reduce individual car usage in cities
rec.transport.detail: Switching to public transport can reduce your carbon footprint by up to 45%. Azerbaijan's expanding metro and bus network in Baku offers efficient alternatives to private vehicles.
rec.energy.title: Save Energy
rec.energy.subtitle: Switch to LED and efficient appliances
rec.energy.detail: LED bulbs use 75% less energy than incandescent bulbs. Energy-efficient appliances with A+++ ratings can cut household energy consumption by 30-40%.
rec.renewables.title: Switch to Renewables
rec.renewables.subtitle: Invest in clean energy sources
rec.renewables.detail: Azerbaijan has significant solar and wind potential. Rooftop solar installations can offset 60-80% of household energy needs and reduce grid CO₂ dependency.

analytics.benchmark.title: Regional Benchmark
analytics.insight0: Energy sector emissions grew 5.0% YoY, driven by increased natural gas consumption during winter months.
analytics.insight1: Renewable energy share reached 20% for the first time — solar and wind each contributing 10%.
analytics.insight2: Absheron region accounts for 52% of national emissions due to Baku's concentrated transport and industry.
analytics.insight3: Cumulative emissions are at 91% of Azerbaijan's estimated Paris Agreement carbon budget.

pred.narrative.gdp.increase: A GDP growth of {{gdp}}% (+{{diff}}% vs baseline) would increase projected emissions by approximately {{impact}} kt by 2030, primarily driven by industrial expansion and higher energy demand.
pred.narrative.gdp.decrease: A GDP growth of {{gdp}}% ({{diff}}% vs baseline) would decrease projected emissions by approximately {{impact}} kt by 2030, primarily driven by reduced economic activity.
pred.narrative.oil.increase: Oil prices at ${{price}}/bbl (+${{diff}} vs baseline) would increase emissions by ~{{impact}} kt, as higher revenue fuels fossil fuel expansion.
pred.narrative.oil.decrease: Oil prices at ${{price}}/bbl (${{diff}} vs baseline) would decrease emissions by ~{{impact}} kt, as lower revenue slows extraction.
pred.narrative.renew.decrease: Achieving {{renew}}% renewable share (+{{diff}}% vs baseline) would decrease emissions by ~{{impact}} kt through displacing fossil fuel generation.
pred.narrative.renew.increase: Achieving {{renew}}% renewable share ({{diff}}% vs baseline) would increase emissions by ~{{impact}} kt through increased reliance on carbon-heavy sources.
pred.narrative.baseline: Current settings are close to the baseline scenario. Adjust the sliders to see how different factors impact emissions projections.
rec.digital.title: Digital Optimization
rec.digital.subtitle: Reduce network & server load
rec.digital.detail: Digital operations generate massive unseen Scope 3 emissions via datacenters. Compress assets, utilize edge-caching, schedule heavy compute during off-peak hours, and decommission "zombie" servers.
rec.circular.title: Circular Economy
rec.circular.subtitle: Localize supply chains
rec.circular.detail: Shift from a linear "take-make-dispose" model. Partner with local, regional suppliers to eliminate long-haul freight emissions. Implement strict recycling and material-recovery processes at end-of-life.
vision.title: Vision 2030 Strategy
vision.subtitle: Azerbaijan's national roadmap to a sustainable and net-zero future
vision.gap.title: AI Target Tracking
vision.gap.subtitle: Prediction vs. Government Trajectory
vision.timeline.title: Historical & Future Roadmap
vision.mega.title: Strategic Mega-Projects
vision.mega.cable.title: Black Sea Energy Cable
vision.mega.cable.desc: Exporting 4 GW of green energy generated in Azerbaijan to Europe via the world's longest underwater cable.
vision.mega.wind.title: Caspian Offshore Wind
vision.mega.wind.desc: Capitalizing on the 157 GW wind power potential of the Caspian Sea to phase out fossil fuel dependency.
vision.mega.smart.title: Karabakh Smart Villages
vision.mega.smart.desc: Developing 100% renewable 'Net-Zero Emission Zones' in liberated territories as a blueprint for the future.
vision.overview.strategyDesc1: Azerbaijan's national strategy mandates a 35% reduction in GHG emissions by 2030, anchored by an aggressive acceleration towards 30% renewable capacity in the national grid. This serves as the critical prerequisite for the ultimate 2050 Net-Zero ambition.
vision.overview.strategyDesc2: The execution relies on three pillars: decentralizing energy generation, building massive carbon sinks through the "Karabakh Net-Zero Zones", and modernizing heavy industry compliance.
vision.overview.contributionDesc1: EcoPulse directly bridges the gap between high-level policy and actionable corporate intelligence. By algorithmically mapping real-time operational metadata to global ESG emission factors, we provide organizations the exact clarity needed to align with state targets.
vision.overview.contributionDesc2: Our predictive tools ensure users don't just calculate past emissions—they forecast trajectories, dynamically simulating how operational optimizations shrink the national deficit.
vision.overview.hub.gapDesc: Compare real-time predictive models against government decline requirements.
vision.overview.hub.mapDesc: Trace historical milestones alongside future policy target dates.
vision.overview.hub.megaDesc: Explore the structural infrastructure projects powering the transition.
vision.page.gap.title: AI Target Tracking & Gap Analysis
vision.page.gap.desc: Tracking national progress isn't a linear science. Our Advanced Recurrent Neural Network (LSTM) engine continuously ingests GDP growth vectors, population density, and current green grid capacity to project a realistic emissions baseline out to 2030. Observe where our AI projection curve strays from the strict national policy requirement curve and instantly calculate the 'Gap Deficit'.
vision.page.roadmap.title: Historical Context & Execution Timeline
vision.page.roadmap.desc: Every major environmental pledge builds upon the successes and failures of its predecessors. This timeline bridges exactly how Azerbaijan’s early ratifications of the Paris Agreement organically evolved into its current aggressive mandate, capturing the critical acceleration window sparked by hosting the global COP29 summit in Baku.
vision.page.mega.title: Strategic Infrastructure Integration
vision.page.mega.desc: Decarbonizing a fossil-heavy economy requires massive, synchronized infrastructure pivots. These are not concepts—they are active mega-projects redefining the national grid. From exporting green energy beneath the Black Sea to constructing entirely isolated Net-Zero grids in liberated territories, these vectors will dictate the success of the 2030 vision.
home.hero.title: Decarbonize with Precision.
home.hero.subtitle: EcoPulse is the leading AI-powered geographic and predictive platform. We empower enterprises and governments to track, simulate, and achieve their Net-Zero targets.
home.features.prediction.title: AI Trajectory Forecasting
home.features.prediction.desc: Go beyond historical spreadsheets. Simulate GDP vectors, oil prices, and renewable capacity to see exactly where your emissions will land in 2030.

home.features.map.desc: A geographic command center tracking 45+ critical energy hubs across 14 economic regions. See the transition physically unfold.

home.features.analytics.desc: Automate CBAM accounting and cross-reference regional footprint deficits instantly against National Determined Contributions.

home.solutions.enterprise.title: Enterprise Compliance

home.solutions.public.title: Public Sector
home.solutions.public.desc: Track Vision 2030 nationwide targets across 14 economic regions. Establish a centralized command hierarchy for tracking isolated grid improvements in Karabakh.
